tags.name: `mc-label`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for displaying labels for form elements and other UI components.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to display a label for a form element or UI component.
When not to use: When you don't need a label or when using a different labeling approach.
Works with components: mc-checkbox-group, mc-date-picker, mc-file-upload, mc-input-date, mc-input-time, mc-input, mc-multi-select, mc-number-stepper, mc-radio-group, mc-select-native, mc-select, mc-switch-group, mc-textarea, mc-typeahead-multi-select, mc-typeahead
Alternative component names: Form Label, Input Label

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the label text. Used to display custom text/icon

Attributes:

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the label.

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - 

  * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - 

Properties:

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the label.

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - 

  * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} -

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the label.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
`label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

Property: label

Default: Label
